name: Fused Multi-Head Attention for Llama 3 8B Full Block (GQA, FP16)

kernelbench_problem.description: Full Llama 3 8B decoder block with FMHA, GQA, and SwiGLU MLP: 32 Q heads, 8 KV heads, head_dim=128, seq_len=2048, intermediate_dim=14336

tile_config.warp_tile: Computed by CUTLASS based on head_dim=128

kernel_level.description: cp.async-based prefetch pipeline for Ampere architecture

implementation.epilogue: None (pure attention, output is attention result)
implementation.gqa_handling: repeat_interleave before kernel call - kernel receives standard MHA inputs
model_components: SwiGLU MLP (gate_proj + SiLU + up_proj + multiply + down_proj)

verification.notes: FP16 tolerance set to 1e-2. Full Llama decoder block with attention and MLP. GQA handled via repeat_interleave BEFORE FMHA kernel. All test sizes passed correctness verification.

notes: Full Llama 3 8B decoder block implementation. CUTLASS FMHA kernel replaces core attention computation (Q@K^T + softmax + attn@V). Achieved 5.29x speedup on pure attention computation, 1.12x on full model (includes SwiGLU MLP). GQA with 8 KV heads repeated 4x to match 32 Q heads BEFORE FMHA kernel call. The kernel receives standard MHA inputs. FMHA throughput: 34.1 TFLOPS (10.9% of theoretical peak for FP16 on A100).
